channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 25th March
item.description:
Overgrown hedge (Cut Back to boundary) 6 Mtrs x 500mm Aprox TM: Give and Take Next to lamp post No 4 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large plastic bundle, 25th March
item.description:
Some wrapped around electric city pole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Tree branches protruding into bus lane., 25th March
item.description:
Tree branches protruding into bus lane, causing damage to buses using the bus lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdown Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th March
item.description:
Cway pothole 1100mm x 700mm x 40mm Stop and go TM required (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: Pothole, 25th March
item.description:
Large pothole in the carriage way between lane 1 & 2 heading southbound in on the A417.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crickley Hill, Birdlip, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again days later Laxton Road, 25th March
item.description:
Someone has left furniture the day after you have cleared up (presumably) the same individual’s last one. Unsure how to resolve this happening again and sorry you have to clean up someone elses mess! Frustrating. All I know is it wasn’t there yesterday evening but spotted this morning 9:30.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 25th March
item.description:
CW: Edge Kerb (Lift and reset). 900mmx250mm TM: Give and Take Stats required Next to Lamp post No 12 (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signs, 25th March
item.description:
All Hail ,the council leaders on 20 mph speed limits in Gloucestershire villages,Churchdown has 20mph on many side roads ,alas this is ignored by most users, The 30mph on Cheltenham Road East through Churchdown on to Staverton has no effective speed control or enforment,I would estimate 60 to 70 percent of drivers using Churchdown are speeding . The section of highway between Elmbridge Court and Staverton has seen numerous vehicle collision s and sadly one fatality , plus some serious injuries. Overall the signage is of poor quality ,road markings the same ,The often quoted motorists should read the Highway Code falls very short on controlling speeding . Speeding is not just on the roadway but also the new cycle path in Churchdown E bikes and Scooters.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 25th March
item.description:
Pothole in the carriageway causing issue.
